queries.question: What department does every hospital have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Departments.departmentName  from Hospitals_Departments join Departments on Hospitals_Departments.departmentId = Departments.id join Hospitals on Hospitals_Departments.hospitalId = Hospitals.id   GROUP BY Hospitals_Departments.departmentId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Hospitals_Departments.hospitalId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Hospitals)

queries.question: Give me the departments that each hospital has.
queries.sql: select hospitals.name , departments.departmentname from Hospitals_Departments join Departments on Hospitals_Departments.departmentId = Departments.id join Hospitals on Hospitals_Departments.hospitalId = Hospitals.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?departmentname WHERE {
  ?hospitals_departments a :Hospitals_Departments .
  ?departments a :Departments .
  ?hospitals_departments p:hasDepartments ?departments .
  ?hospitals a :Hospitals .
  ?hospitals_departments p:hasHospitals ?hospitals .
  ?hospitals p:name ?name .
  ?departments p:departmentName ?departmentname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the departments that each hospital has.
